title: Your Go-to Marketplace for Deals on Used & Secondhand Items | Mercari
memory: The previous action successfully cleared the promotional modal, revealing the listing form. I am currently on the Mercari "List an Item" page and have identified several sections including Product info, Category, Brand, Condition, Shipping, and Pricing, but need to scroll to capture the full form and the submit button.

extract.query: Document all input fields, dropdowns, buttons, and sections on the Mercari listing creation page. Include visible labels, whether they are required or optional, the order from top to bottom, group names, and details on the photo upload area. Also, identify the submit button text and any remaining popups.
